content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness, safety, or robustness issues were found in the current diff. The staged changes only update `.ralph-burning/projects/gsp-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/gsp-1/run.json`; the relevant exit-classification logic in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` and `src/adapters/tmux.rs` already routes nonzero exits through `stdout_for_exit_failure_classification` and includes stdout exhaustion matching via `is_backend_exhausted`.

## Amendments

None.
